[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011100 3
1 10011000 3
2 01111110 6
3 01100110 4
4 01000001 2
5 01010101 4
6 00011100 3
7 10011000 3

01 10 00000110 2
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 01000001 2 match 4
34 43 00010100 2
45 54 00011000 2
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 00100000 1

02 20 00000001 1
13 31 01000100 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 00010000 1
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00000000 a
60 06 00000001 1
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 00010101 3
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 01000001 2 match 4
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 00011000 2
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 00000000 a

04 40 00011100 3 match 0 6
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 01000001 2 match 4
37 73 00000000 a
